summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Weather Prediction and Orchestrator Panel features. Both backend endpoints and frontend components working correctly with real-time LLM integration.
passed_tests: Backend /api/orchestrator-reasoning endpoint returns valid LLM reasoning
Backend /api/weather-prediction endpoint returns valid AI predictions
Weather Prediction panel displays correctly with weather icon, temperature, description
Zone demand forecast bars show Zone A, B, C with percentage values (73%, 72%, 61%)
AI prediction text appears and updates with weather changes
Orchestrator panel displays with 'Orchestrator' heading and conflict status
Orchestrator conflict entries show agent conflicts (DEMAND vs INVENTORY, etc)
Conflict entries expand to show conflict flow and resolution details
AI reasoning appears in orchestrator conflicts after resolution
Weather changes every 30s (tested sunny → heatwave transition)
All existing features work: dark stores, agents, decision log, stats, footer
Layout correctly shows 2-column row (weather + orchestrator) above 3-column grid
Real-time updates and live indicators functioning
LLM integration working with Emergent GPT-4o-mini
